name: nph_vs_ex_vacuo_scoring_schema
description: Structured scoring system for differentiating NPH from hydrocephalus ex vacuo. Educational use only.

structural_brain_injury.notes: Large hemorrhage, infarct, encephalomalacia, surgery, traumatic injury.

ventricular_asymmetry_matching_lesion.notes: Strong sign of passive expansion into damaged territory.

symmetric_ventriculomegaly.notes: Supports NPH if not explained by atrophy.

sylvian_fissures_disproportionately_enla.notes: Supports DESH when combined with tight high-convexity sulci.

tap_test_improvement.notes: Repeated negative high-volume LP strongly argues against clinically significant shunt-responsive NPH.

lp_opening_pressure_cm_h2o.notes: Normal pressure is compatible with both NPH and ex vacuo. Interpret weakly.

interpretation.mixed_or_indeterminate: both scores high or both intermediate
interpretation.recommendation: Use scoring only as decision support; final interpretation requires physician review.
